name: German Prune Coffeecake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine milk (canned milk or half milk and half water), butter, sugar, salt, and lemon extract.
2. Dissolve yeast in 1/3 cup warm water with 1 tsp sugar.
3. Add the yeast mixture and beaten eggs to the milk mixture. Stir until well combined.
4. Gradually add flour and mix until a soft dough forms. Beat with a spoon about 20 times.
5. Let the batter rise until doubled in size.
6. Knead the dough gently. Divide it into two portions and roll each out to a rectangle.
7. Place the rolled dough on a cookie sheet.
8. Put half of the prunes in each center and spread them along the sides toward the center.
9. Cover with a clean cloth and let rise in a warm place until doubled in size.
10. Dot the tops with butter, sugar, and cinnamon.
11. Bake at 350°F for about 20-25 minutes, or until lightly browned.
Makes 2 large coffeecakes.
